349 J0850_STF_PAIN_FREQ_CD J0850_STF_PAIN_FREQ_CD J0850 Staff Frequency of Indicator of Pain or Possible Pain Frequency Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the frequency of the resident's pain or possible pain in the last five days. -=Not assessed/no information
 1=Indicators of pain or possible pain observed 1 to 2 days
 2=Indicators of pain or possible pain
